evals.prompt: When should I use @State vs @StateObject vs @ObservedObject?
evals.expected_output: @State for local simple data. @StateObject for VMs (initialized once). @ObservedObject for passed-in VMs. Views should be small structs.

evals.prompt: My SwiftUI view is doing complex calculations in the body property. Is this okay?
evals.expected_output: No. body property must be computationally cheap. Move logic to ViewModel or computed vars. Keep body for UI composition only.

evals.prompt: Does the order of SwiftUI modifiers matter? (e.g. .padding().background())
evals.expected_output: Order matters. Apply layout modifiers before visual ones. SwiftUI modifiers wrap the view in new layers sequentially.

should_not_trigger: How do I use Core Data?
How do I implement SSL pinning?
How do I set up Fastlane?
How do I register for push notifications?
